title: Conversational AI-based Personal Shopping Assistant
scenario: Develop a prompt that will generate a high-quality, personalized, and engaging persona-based chatbot dialogue for a conversational AI-based personal shopping assistant. The target output should be a text-based dialogue that incorporates style, fashion expertise, and personalized recommendations. The assistant should be able to respond to user queries, provide styling tips, and make product recommendations based on user preferences and budget. The dialogue should be 3-5 lines long, use a stylish and approachable tone, and include a clear call-to-action for users to request personalized recommendations.
constraints: Must include a minimum of 2 user queries and responses

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the dialogue adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the tone of the dialogue stylish, approachable, and engaging?
Is the dialogue high-quality, informative, and entertaining?
Does the dialogue incorporate personalized recommendations based on user preferences and budget?
